name: jadecli-researchers
description: Monorepo scripts for 9 sub-repos. No dependencies — delegates to sub-repo package.json files.

scripts.lint:ts: cd claude-multi-agent-sdk && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../claude-multi-agent-dispatch && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.test:all: npm run test:sdk && npm run test:dispatch && npm run test:crawls
scripts.coverage:all: npm run coverage:sdk && npm run coverage:dispatch && npm run coverage:crawls
scripts.prebuild:verify: cd agenttasks && npm install --silent && npm run build
